title: Le pays d'où je viens
writer: Jacques Emmanuel, Marcel Carné, Marcel Achard
actors: Gilbert Bécaud, Jacques Dhéry, Lucien Fleurot
plot: One Christmas Eve, a young man, Eric, arrives in a small provincial town. Here, he meets Julien, a bar pianist who is his exact double. Julien is in love with Marinette, a pretty waitress, but he is too shy to make any love overtu...
